list.title: Atokọ Awọn Tikiti
list.noTicketsFound: Ko si awọn tikiti ti a ri!

view.title: Tikiti {id}
view.subject: Koko
view.emailDisabled: Imeeli rẹ ({email}) ti pa. Jọwọ kan si
view.allowServerAccess: Gba InterServer laaye lati ṣatunkọ sarvari:
view.ipHelpText: Ti asopọ ba wa lati adirẹsi IP ti o yatọ. Jọwọ yipada rẹ.
view.passwordEncrypted: Awọn ọrọ aṣina ti fipamọ ninu ibi ipamọ data ti o ni ifowopamọ lọtọ.
view.ticketClosed: Tikiti yii ti pa, nitorinaa awọn idahun ti pa. Ti o ba tun nilo iranlọwọ, lero ọfẹ lati ṣii tikiti tuntun a si yoo ni inudidun lati ṣe iranlọwọ.
view.replyHint: Ṣiṣẹda awọn tikiti lọtọ fun awọn ọran tuntun ṣe iranlọwọ fun ẹgbẹ wa lati ṣe pataki ati yanjú wọn yiyara.
view.closeConfirmText: Ṣe o fẹ pa tikiti yii?
view.ticketSettingsUpdated: Awọn Eto Tikiti Ti Ṣe Imudojuiwọn

new.title: Tikiti Tuntun
new.subject: Koko
new.subjectValidation: Jọwọ tẹ apejuwe kukuru nipa ọran naa.
new.descriptionPlaceholder: A dupe fun ṣiṣe iranlọwọ wa lati ṣetọju eto atilẹyin ti o dara nipa fisilẹ ibeere kan fun tikiti kọọkan.
new.descriptionValidation: Jọwọ tẹ apejuwe alaye nipa ọran naa.
new.fileNote: Akiyesi: Awọn faili aworan nikan - gif/jpeg/png ni a gba laaye.
new.allowAccessLabel: Mo gba InterServer laaye lati wọle si sarvari mi ki o ṣe awọn iyipada
new.accessNote: Jọwọ mọ: Nipa ṣiṣii ibeere atilẹyin InterServer le nilo lati wọle si, ṣe ayẹwo, tabi ṣatunkọ awọn faili ninu akọọlẹ rẹ. Ibeere yii jẹ dandan lati pese atilẹyin imọ-ẹrọ. Jọwọ tẹsiwaju nikan ti o ba gba.
